description_long: This street light features a tall, cylindrical pole with a dark, likely metallic finish, supporting a single, extended arm. The arm is gently curved and holds a modern, streamlined lamp head with a flat, oval-shaped cover, likely designed to direct light downward. The lamp head is metallic and appears to have a smooth, slightly reflective surface, with no visible decorative elements or diffusers. The pole itself is plain, with no visible ornamentation, fluting, or ribbing, and is anchored vertically, suggesting a ground-mounted installation. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, suitable for urban streets, sidewalks, or parking lots. The proportions and materials indicate durability and resistance to outdoor conditions.
description: A tall, plain, dark metal street light with a single curved arm supporting a modern, oval lamp head. The design is sleek and functional, with no decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pole as a thin vertical line with the lamp head and arm barely visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the pole and the extended, curved arm with the lamp head projecting outward.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the pole as a vertical line and the back of the lamp head, with the arm mostly hidden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, displaying the curved arm and lamp head from the other side.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, streamlined, oval-shaped lamp head with a flat cover and no visible decorative elements or diffusers.
